untranslatable_reason: This signal requires option-specific calculations (theoretical value vs market price, volatility modeling, model freshness timestamps, moneyness distance) that cannot be expressed using standard OHLCV indicators. The strategy depends on external option pricing models (Black-Scholes or similar) and real-time model input validation, which are not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: NATENBERG_DRY_22_0 is fundamentally a relative value strategy requiring option Greeks, implied volatility, time value decomposition, and theoretical pricing models. Standard price-based indicators cannot capture the core logic of comparing market prices to theoretical values. This signal should be implemented in a dedicated options analytics framework, not a standard equity backtest engine.
